headline: Why Robinhood (HOOD) Shares Are Trading Lower Today
summary: Shares of financial services company Robinhood (NASDAQ:HOOD) fell 4.5% in the afternoon session after KeyBanc lowered its price target on the stock, citing lower estimates driven by cryptocurrency factors.

headline: Robinhood's venture fund invests $75 million in OpenAI
summary: Robinhood's venture fund has invested $75 million in ChatGPT maker OpenAI, it said on Wednesday, aiming ‌to broaden retail investor access to high-profile, privately ‌held technology companies.  Its rise has helped fuel a wave of investment and competition across Big Tech and startups alike, as companies race to ‌build and commercialize AI ⁠tools, drawing billions of dollars into the sector.  Robinhood Ventures Fund I, which went public in March, ⁠aims to give retail investors access to private company investments long dominated by Silicon Valley's largest venture capital firms.

Robinhood Ventures Fund I, which went public in March, ⁠aims to give retail investors access to private company investments long dominated by Silicon Valley's largest venture capital firms.

headline: Robinhood Ventures Fund I (RVI) Announces $75M Investment in OpenAI
summary: MENLO PARK, Calif., April 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Today, Robinhood Ventures Fund I (NYSE: RVI) announced it has closed an investment in OpenAI. On April 17, 2026 RVI purchased approximately $75 million of common stock of OpenAI. “OpenAI is one of the frontier artificial intelligence companies, and we are incredibly proud to add them to the Fund,” said Sarah Pinto, President of Robinhood Ventures Fund I. “As one of RVI’s largest investments to date, this underscores our core mission to provi

headline: Robinhood's venture fund bets on OpenAI as retail rush for AI heats up
summary: Robinhood's venture fund said on Wednesday it has invested $75 million in OpenAI, allowing retail investors exposure to one ‌of the world's hottest privately held AI companies.  Robinhood Ventures Fund I, ‌which went public in March, aims to open up retail investors' access to private-company investments long ​dominated by Silicon Valley's largest venture capital firms.  The buzz surrounding the ⁠AI major has also fueled a wave of investments and intensified competition across Big Tech and startups, as companies race to ⁠build and commercialize AI tools, drawing billions of dollars.

headline: Why Interactive Brokers Earnings Got An Iran War Boost. But Stock Slumps.
summary: Interactive Brokers matched earnings estimates for the first quarter on Tuesday as trading volumes rose. But IBKR stock undercut a buy point on Wednesday, after a big rally in the past year. Interactive Brokers Chairman Thomas Peterffy told CNBC that customers turned to commodity investing — oil, gas and agriculture — in a volatile Q1.

content.title: Why Interactive Brokers Earnings Got An Iran War Boost. But Stock Slumps.
content.summary: Interactive Brokers matched earnings estimates for the first quarter on Tuesday as trading volumes rose. But IBKR stock undercut a buy point on Wednesday, after a big rally in the past year. Interactive Brokers Chairman Thomas Peterffy told CNBC that customers turned to commodity investing — oil, gas and agriculture — in a volatile Q1.
